something to eat.example: After hiking, we found something to eat at a local farmer's house.
something to eat.exampleCn: 徒步后，我们在当地农户家找到了一些吃的东西。

mail a letter.example: I mail a letter to my pen pal in Beijing every month.
mail a letter.exampleCn: 我每月给北京的笔友寄一封信。

in the shopping center.example: We met in the shopping center and had a great time together.
in the shopping center.exampleCn: 我们在购物中心见面，一起度过了愉快的时光。

in some situations.example: In some situations, silence speaks louder than words.
in some situations.exampleCn: 在某些场合，沉默比话语更有力量。

such as.example: I enjoy outdoor activities, such as hiking and cycling.
such as.exampleCn: 我喜欢户外活动，例如徒步和骑自行车。

lead in to a request.example: A polite greeting can lead in to a request more smoothly.
lead in to a request.exampleCn: 礼貌的问候可以更顺畅地引入一个请求。

use proper language.example: We should use proper language when talking to elders.
use proper language.exampleCn: 和长辈交谈时，我们应该使用合适的语言。

park one' s car.example: It is not allowed to park one's car in front of the school gate.
park one' s car.exampleCn: 不允许在学校大门前停车。

an underground parking lot.example: The new mall has an underground parking lot for hundreds of cars.
an underground parking lot.exampleCn: 新商场有一个可容纳数百辆车的地下停车库。

change money.example: Tourists often need to change money when visiting foreign countries.
change money.exampleCn: 游客访问外国时经常需要换钱。

the way to.example: Can you show me the way to the nearest hospital?
the way to.exampleCn: 你能告诉我去最近的医院的路吗？

thank sb. for doing sth.example: I want to thank my teacher for helping me improve my English.
thank sb. for doing sth.exampleCn: 我要感谢我的老师帮助我提高英语。

look forward to.example: I look forward to visiting the Stone Forest next summer vacation.
look forward to.exampleCn: 我期盼明年暑假去参观石林。

meet sb. for the first.example: I was nervous when I met her for the first time.
meet sb. for the first.exampleCn: 当我第一次见到她时，我很紧张。

in a rush to do.example: Never make important decisions in a rush to do something.
in a rush to do.exampleCn: 永远不要仓促地做重要决定。

be convenient to do sth.example: It is convenient to do sth like buying tickets online now.
be convenient to do sth.exampleCn: 现在做像网上购票这样的事情很方便。

sb. suggest.example: My father suggests that I read more books about history.
sb. suggest.exampleCn: 我父亲建议我读更多关于历史的书。

humorous.example: A humorous teacher can make even boring subjects interesting.
humorous.exampleCn: 一个有幽默感的老师可以让即使无聊的科目也变得有趣。

deal.example: Learning to deal with stress is an important life skill.
deal.exampleCn: 学会处理压力是一项重要的生活技能。

ton.example: This truck can carry up to ten tons of fresh fruit.
ton.exampleCn: 这辆卡车可以运载多达十吨的新鲜水果。

require.example: This job requires patience, care, and a willing heart.
require.exampleCn: 这份工作需要耐心、细心和一颗愿意的心。

British.example: British tea culture has influenced people all over the world.
British.exampleCn: 英国茶文化影响了全世界的人们。

ant.example: An ant can carry food many times heavier than itself.
ant.exampleCn: 一只蚂蚁可以搬运比自己重很多倍的食物。

absent.example: He was absent from school because of a bad cold yesterday.
absent.exampleCn: 他昨天因为重感冒没有来学校。

Pride.example: National pride fills our hearts when we see our flag rise.
Pride.exampleCn: 当我们看到国旗升起时，民族自豪感充满我们的心中。

silent.example: The forest was silent except for the sound of falling leaves.
silent.exampleCn: 森林里很安静，只有落叶的声音。

helpful.example: Reading newspapers is helpful for improving our understanding of the world.
helpful.exampleCn: 读报纸有助于提高我们对世界的理解。

interview.example: The journalist came to interview the old craftsman about his art.
interview.exampleCn: 记者来采访这位老工匠关于他的艺术。

Asian.example: Asian cultures value family, respect, and hard work deeply.
Asian.exampleCn: 亚洲文化深深重视家庭、尊重和努力工作。

shyness.example: With practice, shyness can slowly turn into quiet confidence.
shyness.exampleCn: 通过练习，害羞可以慢慢变成沉静的自信。

private.example: Everyone deserves some private time to think and reflect.
private.exampleCn: 每个人都应该有一些私人时间来思考和反思。

guard.example: The guard at the museum protects priceless cultural treasures.
guard.exampleCn: 博物馆的警卫保护着无价的文化珍宝。

European.example: European architecture combines history with artistic beauty.
European.exampleCn: 欧洲建筑将历史与艺术美结合在一起。

African.example: African wildlife is among the most diverse on our planet.
African.exampleCn: 非洲野生动物是我们地球上最多样化的之一。

public.example: We should keep public places clean and beautiful for everyone.
public.exampleCn: 我们应该保持公共场所干净整洁，为了每个人。

fail.example: If you fail once, stand up and try again with more courage.
fail.exampleCn: 如果你失败了一次，站起来，用更多的勇气再试一次。

examination.example: The medical examination showed that he was in good health.

exactly.example: Tell me exactly what happened so I can understand better.
exactly.exampleCn: 确切地告诉我发生了什么，这样我能更好地理解。

general.example: The general opinion is that honesty matters most in friendship.
general.exampleCn: 普遍的观点是，诚实在友谊中最重要。

introduction.example: A good introduction helps readers understand the main idea quickly.
introduction.exampleCn: 一个好的介绍帮助读者快速理解主要观点。

use sth... to do sth.example: We can use old bottles to do sth creative, like making vases.
use sth... to do sth.exampleCn: 我们可以用旧瓶子做一些有创意的事情，比如做花瓶。

wear glasses.example: My brother wears glasses because he loves reading too much.
wear glasses.exampleCn: 我哥哥戴眼镜，因为他太喜欢读书了。

be friendly to.example: We should be friendly to newcomers in our class.
be friendly to.exampleCn: 我们应该对班级里的新同学友好。

be serious about.example: If you are serious about music, practice every single day.
be serious about.exampleCn: 如果你对音乐认真，就每天都要练习。

keep silent.example: Sometimes it is wiser to keep silent than to argue loudly.
keep silent.exampleCn: 有时保持沉默比大声争论更明智。

take an active part in.example: Students should take an active part in community service.
take an active part in.exampleCn: 学生应该积极参与社区服务。

be brave enough to do.example: Be brave enough to do what you believe is right, even if it is hard.
be brave enough to do.exampleCn: 要足够勇敢地做你认为正确的事情，即使它很难。

dare to do sth.example: Only those who dare to do sth different can truly change the world.
dare to do sth.exampleCn: 只有那些敢于做不同事情的人才能真正改变世界。

be helpful to sb.example: Reading aloud every morning is helpful to sb who wants better pronunciation.
be helpful to sb.exampleCn: 每天早上大声朗读对想要更好发音的人有帮助。

help sb out.example: True friends are always ready to help you out when you are in trouble.
help sb out.exampleCn: 真正的朋友总是准备好在你有困难时帮助你。

can't help doing sth.example: I can't help smiling when I see my grandmother's happy face.
can't help doing sth.exampleCn: 当我看到奶奶开心的脸时，我忍不住微笑。

with the help of sb.example: With the help of my teacher, I finally solved the difficult math problem.
with the help of sb.exampleCn: 在老师的帮助下，我终于解决了那道难题。

get good grades.example: If you listen carefully in class, you will get good grades naturally.
get good grades.exampleCn: 如果你上课认真听讲，你自然会取得好成绩。

be interested in.example: I am interested in learning about the history of ancient China.
be interested in.exampleCn: 我对学习中国古代历史感兴趣。

be more.example: We should be more interested in understanding than in winning arguments.
be more.exampleCn: 我们应该对理解比对赢得争论更感兴趣。

on the soccer team.example: Being on the soccer team taught me the value of teamwork.
on the soccer team.exampleCn: 成为足球队队员教会了我团队合作的价值。

turn red.example: The leaves turn red when autumn arrives in the mountain.
turn red.exampleCn: 秋天来临时，山里的叶子变红了。

take up.example: I decided to take up painting as a new hobby this year.
take up.exampleCn: 我今年决定开始把画画当作一个新爱好。

deal with sth.example: Learning to deal with sth difficult makes us stronger.
deal with sth.exampleCn: 学会处理困难的事情让我们变得更强大。

in front of crowds.example: Speaking in front of crowds takes practice and self-confidence.
in front of crowds.exampleCn: 在人群面前演讲需要练习和自信。

have the ability to do.example: Everyone has the ability to do something great if they try hard.
have the ability to do.exampleCn: 如果努力尝试，每个人都有能力做伟大的事情。

be popular in.example: Basketball is popular in our school because it builds teamwork.
be popular in.exampleCn: 篮球在我们学校很受欢迎，因为它培养团队合作。

be popular with.example: The new teacher is popular with students for his creative classes.
be popular with.exampleCn: 这位新老师因为他有创意的课而受到学生欢迎。

two kilos.example: I bought two kilos of fresh apples from the farmer's market.
two kilos.exampleCn: 我从农贸市场买了两千克新鲜苹果。

tons of.example: There are tons of beautiful flowers in the botanical garden.
tons of.exampleCn: 植物园里有大量的美丽花朵。

worry about.example: Do not worry about small mistakes; learn from them instead.
worry about.exampleCn: 不要担心小错误，而是要从中学到东西。

be careful about.example: We should be careful about what we say to others.
be careful about.exampleCn: 我们应该对所说的话小心。

private time.example: Everyone needs some private time to rest and think clearly.
private time.exampleCn: 每个人都需要一些私人时间来休息和清晰思考。

hang out with friends.example: On weekends, I love to hang out with friends at the park.
hang out with friends.exampleCn: 周末，我喜欢和朋友们在公园外面玩。

give up.example: Never give up on your dreams, no matter how hard it gets.
give up.exampleCn: 无论多么困难，永远不要放弃你的梦想。

fight on.example: Even when tired, great athletes fight on until the very end.
fight on.exampleCn: 即使累了，伟大的运动员也会继续奋斗到最后。

a small.example: A small step forward each day leads to big progress over time.
a small.exampleCn: 每天向前迈出一小步，久而久之会带来巨大进步。

the number of.example: The number of students in our school has increased this year.
the number of.exampleCn: 我们学校的学生数量今年增加了。

make it to the top.example: After six hours of climbing, we finally made it to the top.
make it to the top.exampleCn: 经过六个小时的攀登，我们终于成功登顶。

do well in.example: If you practice regularly, you will do well in any subject.
do well in.exampleCn: 如果你定期练习，你会在任何科目上做得好。

It is unbelievable that.example: It is unbelievable that this ancient tree is over a thousand years old.
It is unbelievable that.exampleCn: 很难相信这棵古树已有一千多年的历史。

have difficulty.example: I used to have difficulty speaking English in front of others.
have difficulty.exampleCn: 我过去在别人面前说英语有困难。

cause some problems.example: Lying to friends can cause some problems that are hard to fix.
cause some problems.exampleCn: 对朋友撒谎可能会惹出难以解决的麻烦。

look for.example: I am looking for a quiet place to finish my reading assignment.
look for.exampleCn: 我正在寻找一个安静的地方来完成我的阅读作业。

take care of.example: We should take care of our elderly neighbors during cold winters.
take care of.exampleCn: 在寒冷的冬天，我们应该照顾我们的老年邻居。

boarding school.example: Life at a boarding school teaches students independence early.
boarding school.exampleCn: 寄宿学校的生活早早教会了学生独立。

advise sb. to do sth.example: My doctor advises me to do sth healthy, like running every morning.
advise sb. to do sth.exampleCn: 我的医生建议我做一些健康的事情，比如每天早上跑步。

in person.example: It is better to say sorry in person than to send a message.
in person.exampleCn: 亲自道歉比发信息更好。

take a.example: We decided to take a train to Lijiang for the holiday.
take a.exampleCn: 我们决定乘火车去丽江度假。

even though.example: Even though it rained, we still enjoyed our outdoor picnic.
even though.exampleCn: 即使下雨了，我们仍然享受我们的户外野餐。

be there for sb.example: A true friend will always be there for sb in times of need.
be there for sb.exampleCn: 真正的朋友总会在需要时支持某人。

be worried about.example: My mother is always worried about my health during exam season.
be worried about.exampleCn: 我妈妈总是在考试季担心我的健康。

general introduction.example: The book begins with a general introduction to Chinese history.
general introduction.exampleCn: 这本书以对中国历史的总体介绍开始。

in the past.example: In the past, people traveled mainly by horse and boat.
in the past.exampleCn: 在过去，人们主要靠马和船旅行。

be nervous about.example: It is normal to be nervous about your first public speech.
be nervous about.exampleCn: 对第一次公开演讲感到紧张是正常的。

wear the school uniform.example: We wear the school uniform every Monday for the flag-raising ceremony.
wear the school uniform.exampleCn: 我们每周一穿校服参加升旗仪式。

mind doing sth.example: Do you mind doing sth helpful, like cleaning the classroom?
mind doing sth.exampleCn: 你介意做一些有帮助的事情吗，比如打扫教室？

be proud.example: We are all proud of our hometown's beautiful mountains and rivers.
be proud.exampleCn: 我们都为家乡美丽的山河感到骄傲。

Influence.example: Good teachers have a positive influence on students' whole lives.
Influence.exampleCn: 好老师对学生的一生都有积极的影响。

deal with.example: Learning to deal with failure is part of growing up.
deal with.exampleCn: 学会处理失败是成长的一部分。

chopstick.example: Using chopsticks is a traditional skill every Chinese child learns.
chopstick.exampleCn: 使用筷子是每个中国孩子学习的传统技能。

fork.example: In Western countries, people usually eat with a knife and fork.
fork.exampleCn: 在西方国家，人们通常用刀叉吃饭。

fair.example: The science fair at our school showed many creative inventions.
fair.exampleCn: 我们学校的科学展览展示了许多有创意的发明。

produce.example: Yunnan produces some of the best tea in all of China.
produce.exampleCn: 云南生产中国最好的一些茶叶。

product.example: This factory makes eco-friendly products that protect nature.
product.exampleCn: 这家工厂生产保护自然的环保产品。

avoid.example: To stay healthy, we should avoid eating too much junk food.
avoid.exampleCn: 为了保持健康，我们应该避免吃太多垃圾食品。

boss.example: A good boss listens to workers and values their ideas.
boss.exampleCn: 一个好的老板倾听工人并重视他们的想法。

traffic.example: Rush hour traffic in big cities can be very heavy.
traffic.exampleCn: 大城市的交通高峰期可能会非常拥挤。

competitor.example: Every competitor in the race showed great sportsmanship.
competitor.exampleCn: 比赛中的每个参赛者都表现出了良好的体育精神。

scissors.example: Please pass me the scissors so I can cut this paper.
scissors.exampleCn: 请把剪刀递给我，这样我可以剪这张纸。

environmental.example: Environmental protection is everyone's responsibility, not just the government's.
environmental.exampleCn: 环境保护是每个人的责任，不仅仅是政府的。
